commit_message:
RTL updates  RTL updates  - Fix for https://github.com/RTimothyEdwards/caravel_openframe_project/issues/17 
- Fix for https://github.com/RTimothyEdwards/caravel_openframe_project/issues/16 
- Change the base address for interrupt in PicoRV32 
- The PR has common cocotb changes with https://github.com/RTimothyEdwards/caravel_openframe_project/pull/14

from os import path
import sys

sys.path.append(path.abspath('/home/rady/caravel/openframe/caravel-sim-infrastructure/cocotb'))

from interfaces.common_functions.test_functions import report_test
from interfaces.common_functions.test_functions import test_configure
from interfaces.UART import UART
from interfaces.SPI import SPI
from interfaces.caravel import Caravel_env

import cocotb

- Fix for https://github.com/RTimothyEdwards/caravel_openframe_project/issues/16

examples.patch:
@@ -3,6 +3,7 @@
 from cocotb.clock import Clock
 from cocotb.triggers import ClockCycles, Edge
 from cocotb_includes import UART
+from cocotb_includes import SPI
 
 class OpenFrame:
     def __init__(self, caravelEnv):
@@ -67,4 +68,7 @@ def change_clk_div(self, new_clk_div):
         self.bit_time_ns = round(self.period *(2 + new_clk_div))  
         cocotb.log.info(f"[OpenFrameUART] configure UART with new clk div {new_clk_div} bit_time_ns = {self.bit_time_ns}ns")
 
-    
\ No newline at end of file
+class OpenFrameSPI(SPI):
+    def __init__(self, caravelEnv, clk_period=None, spi_pins={"CSB": 3, "SCK": 4, "SDO": 2, "SDI": 1}) -> None:
+        super().__init__(caravelEnv, clk_period=clk_period,spi_pins=spi_pins)
+        
\ No newline at end of file
